inputs.label: Component 1
inputs.businessContext: First component of the vector (e.g., x-component).

businessContext_i18n.en: First component of the vector (e.g., x-component).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erste Komponente des Vektors (z. B. x-Komponente).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Première composante du vecteur (par ex., composante x).
businessContext_i18n.es: Primer componente del vector (ej. componente x).

inputs.label: Component 2
inputs.businessContext: Second component of the vector (e.g., y-component).

businessContext_i18n.en: Second component of the vector (e.g., y-component).
businessContext_i18n.de: Zweite Komponente des Vektors (z. B. y-Komponente).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Deuxième composante du vecteur (par ex., composante y).
businessContext_i18n.es: Segundo componente del vector (ej. componente y).

inputs.label: Component 3
inputs.businessContext: Third component of the vector (e.g., z-component).

businessContext_i18n.en: Third component of the vector (e.g., z-component).
businessContext_i18n.de: Dritte Komponente des Vektors (z. B. z-Komponente).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Troisième composante du vecteur (par ex., composante z).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tercer componente del vector (ej. componente z).

inputs.label: Component 4
inputs.businessContext: Fourth component of the vector (e.g., w-component for 4D vectors).

businessContext_i18n.en: Fourth component of the vector (e.g., w-component for 4D vectors).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vektörün dördüncü bileşeni (örneğin 4B vektörler için w-bileşeni).
businessContext_i18n.de: Vierte Komponente des Vektors (z. B. w-Komponente für 4D-Vektoren).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Quatrième composante du vecteur (par ex., composante w pour les vecteurs 4D).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuarto componente del vector (ej. componente w para vectores 4D).
businessContext_i18n.ar: المكون الرابع للمتجه (مثل المكون w للمتجهات رباعية الأبعاد).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
